hypothesis: If MOF band gaps are predicted by ∆-learning that corrects GFN1-xTB values using XGBoost on selected RAC/ST-135/APRDF descriptors, then the corrected predictions will achieve lower error against PBE and HSE06 DFT band gaps than both direct-learning XGBoost and deep-learning baselines (MOFTransformer, CGCNN) because the systematic, structure-dependent errors of GFN1-xTB are learnable from these descriptors.
